name: iOS Onboarding Experience
description: Test the first-launch onboarding experience. Verifies onboarding pages appear (or gracefully skips if not shown) and navigates through to the Model Hub.

steps.description: Wait for initial UI to stabilize after launch.
Check if onboarding or tab bar is visible (first launch vs subsequent).
Tap Continue/Next button if onboarding is shown.
Tap Next if there is a second onboarding page.
Tap Get Started if final onboarding page.
Wait for Model Hub to appear after onboarding completes.
Verify Model Hub is visible with tab bar after onboarding.
Verify Model Hub has content sections.
